raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a shower door ( and other items ) from Home Depot via their store card. The door did not arrive at the store for pickup, employees looked for around half an hour and sent me home to call online customer service. I called customer service and they sent a new door directly to my address with the promise to refund the prior purchase. However, the purchase was never refunded. I disputed the charge and sent the invoices and customer service contacts I had. The card servicer said since I couldn't prove I didn't pick it up, the charge was valid and I should pay for merchandise I did not receive. They have since sent the account to collections, and it is damaging my credit
